markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Gather feedback on GrowthX's partnership with FOSSA to improve content generation processes and understand reasons for ending the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [FOSSA sought GrowthX's expertise to modernize and scale their content program using AI tools, aiming for faster, quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Technical nature of FOSSA's product, need for in-house data, and non-traditional publishing process (GitHub-based) led to decision to bring content creation in-house](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Suggestion for GrowthX: Consider offering subject matter experts for QA in specific industries to enhance content quality and client confidence](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)

## Topics

### Initial Goals and Expectations

  - [CEO connection or recommendation led to GrowthX partnership](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Objectives:](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
      - [Modernize and scale content program using AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
      - [Learn from experts and jumpstart organic traffic efforts](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
      - [No specific quantifiable metrics, but focus on repeatable, scalable AI-generated traffic assets](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
      - [Emphasis on moving faster with quality content, both long-form editorial and PSEO tool-type assets](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

### Challenges and Reasons for Bringing Content In-House

  - [Subject matter expertise: High bar for quality in technical product/audience](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [PSEO content quality reliant on internal data, difficult to communicate externally](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Non-traditional content publishing process:](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
      - [No CMS, content assets in GitHub repo](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Manual publishing in Markdown and code](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Inefficient to work with external agency given these factors](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

### Current Content Generation Approach

  - [Andy using AI for \~40% of content creation](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [ChatGPT for deep research, treated as first draft](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Not yet comfortable with 90%+ AI-generated content for longer-form editorial](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Open to more AI involvement in PSEO content](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

### Feedback on GrowthX Partnership

  - [Strong onboarding, despite initial competing priorities](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Appreciated extra layer of QA for code snippets](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Valuable learning experience, though ultimately decided in-house approach was necessary](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

### Future Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Potential shift towards 40-50% AI involvement in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Anticipation of increased focus on craftsmanship and quality](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Suggestion for GrowthX: Offer true subject matter experts for technical industries](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### GrowthX's Evolving Platform and Workflows

  - [Transition to internal platform with custom code base](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [More specific prompting and better content control](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Developing company-specific artifacts (personas, writing guidelines, technical guardrails)](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Integration of deep research and evolving brand context](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Potential for more accurate and tonally relevant content generation](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to consider incorporating subject matter experts for QA in specific industries](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Potential follow-up conversation in a few months to discuss GrowthX's platform evolution](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [GrowthX to refine initial calibrations and approach for technical clients](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [FOSSA to stay updated on GrowthX's progress and new offerings](https://fathom.video/share/x3iUhs-L3uGTJ5Cx6gyR3XqihnTqx7xz?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
